jobs.title: Software Development Engineer III
details: Working on new features for Amazon Verified Permissions.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer II
details: Designed and developed a Rust-based managed authentication and authorization service for a new zero trust identity system.
Vendored internal Rust libraries for other AWS service teams integrating with the service.
Engineered caching solutions that delivered single-digit millisecond response times.
Created design task breakdowns and collaborated across multiple teams on implementation.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer II
details: Built features for a drag-and-drop lifecycle marketing tool used to create personalized customer experiences for millions of users per day.
Developed a cross-team ML feature for automatically selecting the best customer experience.
Reduced S3, Athena, and Glue resource utilization through storage reductions, query optimization, and effective partitioning.
Created an automated system to halt under-performing or malfunctioning marketing campaigns.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer I
details: Designed and implemented a notification system that sent hundreds of weekly alerts about campaign progress, engagement, and issues.
Developed a high-capacity customer event processor that managed millions of events and triggered engagement on key lifecycle milestones.

jobs.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Collaborated with a third-party mobile app vendor to build backend services for the company's new mobile application.
Created a CI/CD deployment pipeline with GitHub Actions.
Integrated with Salesforce and other third-party CRMs.

jobs.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Streamlined financial operations with an invoice system built on Amazon Textract, Amazon Rekognition, and Salesforce that processed hundreds of invoices per day.
Developed web-accessible Power BI dashboards for both internal and external use.
Refactored an Azure IoT application to reduce expenses.
Enhanced Azure Cosmos DB request efficiency, resulting in a 10x reduction in website load times.
Migrated projects from Team Foundation Server to GitHub.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
details: Designed and delivered a debugger tool for marketers to see a customer's position in their marketing campaigns.
Quickly acclimated to a new role during the three-month internship.
Participated in the team's software development processes.
Cum Laude

projects.title: spotify-lyrics
projects.description: A spotify player that gets the lyrics for the song you are currently listening to.

projects.title: Super-Marka-Metrics
projects.description: A supermarket budgeting tool that helped users visualize their spending habits and uses machine learning to predict the cost of future trips to the store.

projects.title: V-Net Lab
projects.description: A network topology tool similar to Microsoft Visio. Allows user to design the layout of their network and configure network devices.

projects.title: Automated Document Processor
projects.description: Event driven, serverless processor that reads, extracts and bills invoice information using optical character recogition. Reduces human interaction with the billing process by 15%

projects.title: zero-touch-sani-system
projects.description: Senior design project. A handsfree sanitation system to sanitize areas in the office. Uses raspberry pi, various perhipals like monition sensors, google cloud IOT, firebase and a web interface to control the device.
